Class GZipProofSaver

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.OutputStreamProofSaver
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.ProofSaver
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.GZipProofSaver
public class GZipProofSaver extends ProofSaver
This proof saver derivative wraps its generated output stream into a GZIPOutputStream thus compressing proof files.

  • Constructor Details

    • GZipProofSaver

      public GZipProofSaver(Proof proof, String fileName, String internalVersion)
      Instantiates a new proof saver.
      Parameters:
      proof - the non-null proof to save
      fileName - the name of the file to write to
      internalVersion - the internal version

  • Method Details

    • save

      protected void save(Path file) throws IOException
      Save the proof to file referenced by file.

      The format in which the proof is stored depends on the class. Thr base class creates a plain output file. Subclasses may choose to use other formats.

      This subclass wraps the file stream into a GZIPOutputStream.

      Overrides:
      save in class ProofSaver
      Parameters:
      file - the file to write to
      Throws:
      IOException - if I/O fails
